notes: Ultra settings 1080P, does take a little bit to actually load up but no performance impact is noticeable with this configuration. Stable at 144FPS.
title: Temtem

notes: The game runs (controllers needed some work/tinkering) but the frame rate is often more reminiscent of a dia show. But generally "playable" - plus it's Alpha.
